items: Convert to measurable bullets: "Built a Python market-making simulator processing 1.2M tick rows; reduced option risk-analysis scenario runtime by 38%" -> "Built a Python market-making simulator processing 1.2M tick rows, reducing option risk-analysis runtime by 38% (from X to Y)" to include baseline and target.
Specify tech stack and libraries: include pandas, NumPy, PyTorch/GPy/Vectorized operations, and backtesting framework to signal technical depth.
Quant-specific impact: quantify statistical methods used (e.g., P&L distribution, VaR, Sharpe) and benchmark against baseline; add a line like "validated strategies with backtested P&L, Sharpe 1.8+".
Add collaboration and deployment: add note on teamwork with data engineers/arena and deployment steps (Git, Docker) to show workflow maturity.
Clarify role target and timing: explicitly mention "Target: Quant internship Summer 2027; available for full-time 2027-09 or earlier".
